name: trove
description: Reference tools for underused public healthcare data — Claude skills over FDA drug approvals and nonprofit hospital reporting (CMS Cost Reports + IRS 990 Schedule H).

plugins.name: trove
plugins.description: Two Claude skills for looking up underused public healthcare data: hcris-analyst (CMS Worksheet S-10 vs. IRS 990 Schedule H, side-by-side) and fda-analyst (FDA novel drug approvals + approval-package documents).
